---
title: "Final paper"
author: "Alyssa Hagele, Abby Malech, Henderson Vo"
format: pdf 
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: false
---

# Introduction 

# Methods 

# Results 

![Figure 1](../images/species-richness-time.png)
![Figure 2](../images/barpALL.png)
![Figure 3](../images/barpSELECTED.png)



![Figure 4](../images/selectedsppfaceted.png)


![Figure 5](../images/native-non-native-percover.png)


![Figure 6](../images/foursppkey.png)


# Discussion 

# References
